containment.notes: Degradation stayed bounded to the run and surface.

fallback_fidelity.notes: Retrieval-only answer remained weaker than full hybrid mode.

recovery_latency.notes: Operator-visible recovery exists, but adaptation is still early.

operator_burden.notes: Recovery remains reviewable but still requires manual interpretation.

trust_calibration.notes: Degraded status is explicit and machine-readable.

blind_spots: No verified repeated-window adaptation result yet
verdict_summary: Promising first-wave antifragile posture with strong containment and trust calibration, but insufficient evidence for adaptation gain.
